## X-Sense Home Security v1.2.6.53

### Camera WebRTC
- Continues prerelease camera testing for accounts where the camera connects but the screen remains black.
- Fixes the raw H264 startup crash caused by compact debug reading a missing ticket expiry property.
- Keeps X-Sense WebRTC camera video on the native raw H264 path without video transcoding.

### Debug Logging
- Hardens ticket, SDP, and payload debug helpers so diagnostics cannot interrupt stream startup.
- Removes the untagged 1.2.6.51 release-note entry from the changelog.
